addition.item: Added extra information in backend regarding OpenWeatherMap API and Debug options

fix.item: Fixed error when API did not return data.
Improved error handling from API response
Various bugfixes and improvements in the Helper Class.

addition.item: Added Open-Meteo as an alternative weather provider (keyless and free, with genuine daily min/max temperatures).

Added OpenWeatherMap One Call API 4.0 as an alternative provider (genuine daily min/max; requires the billing-enabled "One Call by Call" subscription, first 1,000 calls/day free; uses two calls per refresh).
Added an optional Location name field to fill the {name} placeholder (overrides the provider name; required to show a name with Open-Meteo).
Added a backend note explaining that OpenWeatherMap's min/max temperatures are usually equal to the current temperature for a single location.
